title: lastrea thwaitesii
intro: Lastrea thwaitesii, also known as Thwaites' fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Lastrea and is native to Sri Lanka. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea thwaitesii include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in capsule or powder form for medicinal purposes.
